title: Indulgent Mediterranean Russet Potato Hash
description: A mustardy, crumbly, indulgent Mediterranean dish featuring russet potato, perfect for a keto-friendly breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Toss the diced potatoes with 2 tablespoons of olive oil, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the potatoes in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
While the potatoes are roasting, cook the diced bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crispy.
Remove the cooked bacon from the skillet with a slotted spoon and set aside on a paper towel-lined plate.
Add the diced red onion and minced garlic to the same skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese, dried oregano, and whole mustard seeds.
Once the potatoes are done roasting, add them to the skillet with the onion and feta mixture.
Crumble the cooked bacon into the potato mixture and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the potato mixture to a serving dish and top with a dollop of creamed Greek yogurt.
Garnish with fresh parsley or dill, if desired.
